name: Scheduler Event Frequency Daily
script: tomorrow = frappe.utils.add\_days(frappe.utils.nowdate(), 1) events = frappe.get\_all( "School Event", filters={ "start\_date": tomorrow, "publish": 1, "status": ["!=", "Cancelled"] }, fields=["name", "title", "venue", "start\_date"] ) for event in events: event\_doc = frappe.get\_doc("School Event", event.name) recipients = [] for participant in event\_doc.participants: if participant.email: recipients.append(participant.email) recipients = list(set(recipients)) if recipients: frappe.sendmail( recipients=recipients, subject="Event Reminder: {0}".format(event\_doc.title), message=""" Dear Participant,, ,  This is a reminder that the event **{0}** is scheduled for **{1}**., ,  **Venue:** {2}, ,  Thank you.,  School Administration """.format( event\_doc.title, event\_doc.start\_date, event\_doc.venue ) )
